summary: Iteration 26: Verified interdiction planner enhancements and route planner functionality. All backend APIs (POST /api/routes/interdiction, POST /api/routes/chase, GET /api/routes/locations, GET /api/routes/calculate) working correctly. Frontend UI verified: Route tab (ship selector, fleet toggle, QD size selectors, route calculation), Interdiction tab (QD selectors, origin presets, snare slider, results panels), Chase tab (QD selectors, distance/prep sliders, chase results).

critical_code_review_comments: All interdiction planner enhancements are working correctly
API response structure matches frontend expectations
Canvas-based star map renders routes and snare positions correctly
QD size selectors properly update calculations in real-time
seed_data_creation: Created test user testpilot26 for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified the interdiction planner enhancements requested in the review. All features working: (1) POST /api/routes/interdiction accepts your_qd_size and target_qd_size, returns coverage_pct, route_details with per-route timing, escape_analysis, tactical_notes, nearby_pois, timing with arrival windows, and second_snare suggestion. (2) POST /api/routes/chase returns can_catch based on QD speed comparison. (3) Frontend Route Planner has 3 tabs - Route, Interdiction, Chase - all rendering correctly with proper data-testid attributes. (4) Interdiction results display coverage summary, route breakdown, arrival timeline, escape analysis, tactical notes, and nearby POIs.
